name: Sanji - OP06-119 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck and play up to 1 Character with a cost of 9 or less other than [Sanji]. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
